channel.title: SPL - Douglass-Truth Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Douglass-Truth Branch

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Monday, March 16, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Tuesday, March 17, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

Event details

item.title: Teen Zone!
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

Teens! Drop in for Teen Zone! a rotating series of activities and fun.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year.

item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

item.title: Book Release: "Limitless, Stories from the Neighborhood that Shaped Seattle"
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 2:30 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch

Meet some of the artists and storytellers whose artworks and voices are in the book.
